hero.title: Make your company
hero.description: We combine the speed of Artificial Intelligence with the wisdom of Human Intelligence. We transform data into strategic decisions in 48 hours.

step1.title: Ingestion
step1.desc: Share links and documents. Our AI enriches and structures the data automatically.

step2.title: Hybrid Processing
step2.desc: Algorithms apply Porter and PESTEL. Senior consultants validate strategic intuition.

step3.title: Decision
step3.desc: Receive a pragmatic executive report. Clear insights, ready for the board.

testimonials.title: Companies that have already transformed their strategic decisions

testimonial1.quote: Renato combines board expertise with strategic AI — driving the future of corporate governance with clarity and impact. Highly recommended.
testimonial1.author: Felipe Figueira

testimonial2.quote: Renato combines deep experience with AI applied to strategy — transforming decisions at Associação Despertar. Clarity, pace and results. I recommend with conviction.
testimonial2.author: Rodolfo Villela Marino

about.title: Meet the founders who combine decades of experience with a vision for the future

founder1.name: Renato de Faria e Almeida Prado
founder1.bio: With nearly 30 years of experience in boards, innovation, and purpose-driven leadership, Renato combines a rare strategic vision with the ability to translate complexity into action. Co-founder of 10xMentorAI and IMENSIAH, he works at the intersection of governance and artificial intelligence, helping leaders apply technology with wisdom — not just speed. His mission is clear: to make companies and leaders more human, sustainable, and exponential, uniting experience, intuition, and AI in a single flow of intelligent decision-making.

founder2.name: Daniela de Luca Brandão
founder2.bio: A specialist in strategy, management, process architecture, and finance, Daniela is the analytical and creative force behind IMENSIAH. Her journey combines structured reasoning and critical thinking with a human and innovative approach to solving complex problems. At IMENSIAH, she leads the integration between operational efficiency and strategic intelligence, ensuring that each solution is precise, practical, and oriented toward real results.

founder3.name: Renato DAP
founder3.bio: Engineer and developer specialized in artificial intelligence and full-stack systems. Currently pursuing Computer Science with a focus on Deep Learning and AI Research at Rose-Hulman Institute of Technology, he combines technical AI expertise (GPT-4, RAG, PyTorch) with practical development skills (Next.js, React Native, Golang). Creator of innovative solutions that unite technology and real impact, from voice-controlled culinary assistants to adaptive AI fitness platforms. At IMENSIAH, he leads the technical implementation of artificial intelligence solutions, ensuring that technology serves strategy with excellence and innovation.

formUnavailable.title: Coming Soon to Your Region
formUnavailable.message: Our strategic analysis service is currently available only in Brazil. We're working to expand to other regions soon.

landing.heroDescription: The platform that combines analytical rigor with exponential speed.
landing.problemsSubtitle: In a volatile market, slow decisions are bad decisions. SMEs and Mid-Market companies face structural challenges invisible until it's too late.
landing.problem1Desc: Without real-time data, strategy becomes merely a response to crises, never an anticipation of opportunities.
landing.problem2Desc: Scarce resources are diluted in low-impact initiatives due to lack of clarity on what really moves the needle.
landing.problem3Desc: While you look inward, the market changes outside. The lack of market intelligence creates fatal vulnerabilities.
landing.featuresSubtitle: Porter, SWOT, PESTEL, TAM-SAM-SOM, Blue Ocean and more.
landing.feature1Desc: Automatic analysis using 11 classic strategic frameworks applied to your specific context.
landing.feature2Desc: Each framework feeds the next, creating cumulative strategic reasoning that reduces noise and eliminates bias.
landing.feature3Desc: 95% reduction in analysis time compared to traditional consultancies.
landing.pipelineSubtitle: A systematic process that transforms complexity into clarity.

pipelineSteps.title: PESTEL
pipelineSteps.desc: Competitive intensity analysis using macroeconomic assumptions.

pipelineSteps.title: Porter 5+2
pipelineSteps.desc: Classic competitive forces + digital ecosystem and sustainability.

pipelineSteps.title: TAM-SAM-SOM
pipelineSteps.desc: Market sizing using SWOT to define scope.

pipelineSteps.title: SWOT
pipelineSteps.desc: Analysis of strengths, weaknesses, opportunities and threats with confidence and sources.

pipelineSteps.title: Benchmarking
pipelineSteps.desc: Comparison with competitors and industry best practices.

pipelineSteps.title: Blue Ocean
pipelineSteps.desc: Definition of the new value curve to exit irrelevant competition.

pipelineSteps.title: Growth Hacking
pipelineSteps.desc: Growth mechanisms based on Blue Ocean strategy.

pipelineSteps.title: Scenarios
pipelineSteps.desc: Strategic responses: What can kill the plan?

pipelineSteps.title: OKRs
pipelineSteps.desc: Delivery horizon with objectives and key results.

landing.pipelineCta: Ready to apply this pipeline to your company?
landing.modelSubtitle: Radical transparency about the platform's current capabilities.
modelIncludes: Red Ocean vs. Blue Ocean diagnosis
landing.modelFocus: Focus: strategic diagnosis, not operational efficiency.
landing.securitySubtitle: Your strategy is your greatest asset. Our architecture ensures it remains confidential, isolated, and under your absolute control.
landing.security1Desc: Each client operates in a logically segregated environment. Company A's information never crosses with Company B.
landing.security2Desc: Full traceability of decisions. Know exactly which user or AI agent generated each strategic insight.
landing.security3Desc: Your strategic intelligence lives in an exclusive digital vault under your control.
